name: AeroSound Max
description: Experience studio-grade audio quality with adaptive active noise cancellation, 40-hour battery life, and spatial audio support. Built with carbon-fiber reinforced earcups and memory foam cushions.

name: Minimalist Chrono
description: Elegant, clean design featuring a matte black stainless steel case, scratch-resistant sapphire glass, and a genuine Italian leather strap. Water resistant up to 50 meters.

name: Lumio Arc
description: Intelligent lighting featuring customizable HSL colors, light temperature control, integrated 15W wireless phone charger, and smart voice assistant integration.

name: Apex Shell Backpack
description: Anti-theft modern backpack with modular packing compartments, integrated USB-C charging port, and water-repellent hardshell exterior. Fits laptops up to 16 inches.

name: Glass HUD Smartwear
description: Compact, stylish smart glasses projecting navigation overlay, notification HUD, and workout stats in real-time directly onto your field of view.

name: ZenFlow Keyboard
description: Ultra-quiet hot-swappable mechanical switches with customized maple-wood body, durable double-shot PBT keycaps, and dual-mode 2.4GHz + Bluetooth connectivity.

name: Nova Pods ANC
description: Featherlight active noise-cancelling earbuds with immersive deep bass, customizable touch tap patterns, custom EQ app profiles, and IPX7 sweatproof resistance.

name: Nomad Self-Purifying Flask
description: Equipped with state-of-the-art UV-C purification technology that cleans the water and interior of the bottle at the touch of a button. Double-walled vacuum insulation.
